claim: The causal level and direction of normalized intraday VRP contain information about the next 60-minute payoff distribution of a bounded-risk nearest-expiry NIFTY iron condor. The first daily sustained transition from non-positive to positive VRP favours the short ATM +/-1 iron condor protected at ATM +/-3 over its exact inverse, when entered at the next minute and closed after 60 minutes.
null: The first daily sustained non-positive-to-positive normalized-VRP crossing does not produce positive net return on SPAN-plus-exposure margin and does not outperform the exact inverse or matched non-crossing controls.
alternative: The first daily sustained non-positive-to-positive normalized-VRP crossing produces positive net return on SPAN-plus-exposure margin and outperforms the exact inverse and matched non-crossing controls.

universe.expiry: actual nearest eligible weekly expiry required for confirmation; nearest-listed-expiry research proxy used in formulation evidence
universe.entry_moneyness: all legs inside rolling ATM +/-3 at entry

signal.iv: ATM IV independently inverted under parity-forward Black-76 on an ACT/365 expiry clock; provider IV is reconciliation-only
signal.rv: sum of the previous 60 contiguous NIFTY spot one-minute squared log returns, annualized on the same ACT/365 clock
signal.smoother: V5_t = median(V_(t-4), ..., V_t), requiring five contiguous observations
signal.level: zero on the normalized variance-rate curve
signal.causal_percentile: same-minute-of-day rank against prior dates only; recorded as intensity, never used as a lot multiplier
excluded_features: VRP acceleration as an entry requirement

structure.name: short_iron_condor
structure.inverse_comparator: long iron condor with every weight reversed
structure.contract_tracking: expiry, strike, and option type frozen at entry; no rolling-offset substitution

execution.confirmation_marking: conservative executable marks after charges, volume/OI depth, staleness, slippage, and margin

primary_outcome: 60-minute net basket P&L divided by entry SPAN-plus-exposure margin
formulation_outcomes: gross return on theoretical maximum expiry loss
controls: exact inverse long iron condor at the same event
promotion_requirements: positive net mean return on SPAN-plus-exposure margin
date-block bootstrap lower 95% bound above zero or an explicit inconclusive decision
outperformance of inverse and matched controls
survival under base and 1.5x conservative slippage
acceptable CVaR, drawdown, concentration, weekly and monthly stability
credible performance across expiry and regulatory regimes
genuine prospective evidence after the frozen formulation
limitations: Dhan WEEK expiryCode=1 rolling history does not expose actual contract expiry identity
source is a rolling ATM +/-10 surface, not an absolute-strike full chain
exact frozen contracts can leave the observable rolling surface as spot migrates
formulation marks exclude charges, slippage, staleness penalties, and SPAN capital
historical SPAN arrival times are not proven point in time
the full 2021-2026 history influenced formulation and is not a pristine holdout
expiry IV projected onto 60 minutes assumes a locally flat variance rate and is not a pure 60-minute forward variance quote
special and shortened sessions make 60-minute trading structurally unavailable on some dates
missing exact-contract exits are tail-correlated and cannot be treated as missing at random
